abort.missing_configuration: The integration is not configured. Please follow the documentation.

data.remove_events: Remove events no longer in the feed

data.color_id: Event color ID (1–11, leave blank for default)

confirm_remove.title: Remove Calendar Source
confirm_remove.description: Remove **{source_label}**?  Events already synced to Google Calendar will not be deleted.

se_settings.title: SportsEngine Settings
se_settings.description: Credentials are used to fetch field/location details and are re-used automatically when the session expires.

data.location_abbreviations_raw: Location abbreviations (one per line: Venue Name = Short Name)
data.se_title_removals_raw: Title tokens to remove from SportsEngine events (comma-separated)

error.invalid_url: URL must start with http:// or https://

se_login_failed.title: SportsEngine login failed
se_login_failed.description:
Could not log in to SportsEngine. Field/location data will not be fetched until the credentials are corrected.

Update your credentials in **Settings → Devices & Services → ICS GCal Sync → Configure → SportsEngine settings**.

confirm.title: Update SportsEngine credentials
confirm.description: Open the integration options to update your SportsEngine username and password.
